_load_w13(\n448\t        self,\n449\t        expert_data: torch.Tensor,\n450\t        shard_dim: int,\n451\t        shard_id: str,\n452\t        loaded_weight: torch.Tensor,\n453\t        tp_rank: int,\n454\t        is_bias: bool = False,\n455\t    ):\n456\t        # Index the loaded weight for tp sharding.\n457\t        # gate_up_proj: \"MergedColumnParallel\", so tp sharding on output_dim\n458\t        assert shard_id in {\"w1\", \"w3\", \"w13\"}\n459\t\n460\t        if is_bias:\n461\t            # if this weight is a bias, the last dimension must be the sharded dimension\n462\t            shard_dim = -1\n463\t\n464\t        if shard_id in {\"w1\", \"w3\"} and self.moe_runner_config.is_gated:\n465\t            # non-fused version\n466\t            shard_size = expert_data.shape[shard_dim] // 2\n467\t        elif shard_id in {\"w13\"} or (\n468\t            shard_id in {\"w1\", \"w3\"} and not self.moe_runner_config.is_gated\n469\t        ):\n470\t            # fused version\n471\t            shard_size = expert_data.shape[shard_dim]\n472\t        else:\n473\t            raise NotImplementedError\n474\t\n475\t        # Narrow parameter and load.\n476\t        # w1, gate_proj: Load into first logical weight of w13.\n477\t        # w3, up_proj: Load into second logical weight of w13.\n478\t        # trtllm cutlass kernel assumes differently\n479\t        switch_w13 = getattr(self.quant_method, \"load_up_proj_weight_first\", False)\n480\t        if (\n481\t            (switch_w13 and shard_id == \"w1\") or (not switch_w13 and shard_id == \"w3\")\n482\t        ) and self.moe_runner_config.is_gated:\n483\t            start = shard_size\n484\t        else:\n485\t            start = 0\n486\t\n487\t        if self.use_padded_loading:\n488\t            if _is_cpu and is_bias:\n489\t                shard_dim = 1\n490\t            expert_data, loaded_weight = narrow_padded_param_and_loaded_weight(\n491\t                expert_data,\n492\t                loaded_weight,\n493\t                start,\n494\t                shard_size * tp_rank,\n495\t                shard_dim,\n496\t                shard_size,\n497\t                not self.use_presharded_weights,\n498\t            )\n499\t        else:\n500\t            if not self.use_presharded_weights:\n501\t                if not is_bias and self.use_triton_kernels:\n502\t                    # do not transpose for bias\n503\t                    loaded_weight = loaded_weight.transpose(-2, -1)\n504\t                loaded_weight = loaded_weight.narrow(\n505\t                    shard_dim, shard_size * tp_rank, shard_size\n506\t                )\n507\t\n508\t            expert_data = expert_data.narrow(shard_dim, start, shard_size)\n509\t        expert_data.copy_(loaded_weight)\n510\t\n511\t    def _load_w2(\n512\t        self,\n513\t        expert_data: torch.Tensor,\n514\t        shard_dim: int,\n515\t        shard_id: str,\n516\t        loaded_weight: torch.Tensor,\n517\t        tp_rank: int,\n518\t        is_bias: bool = False,\n519\t    ):\n520\t        \"\"\"Load w2 weights for down projection.\n521\t\n522\t        Args:\n523\t            expert_data: The expert data tensor to load into\n524\t            shard_dim: The dimension to shard along\n525\t            shard_id: The shard ID (must be \"w2\")\n526\t            loaded_weight: The weight tensor to load from\n527\t            tp_rank: The tensor parallel rank\n528\t        \"\"\"\n529\t        if not isinstance(expert_data, torch.Tensor) or not isinstance(\n530\t            loaded_weight, torch.Tensor\n531\t        ):\n532\t            raise ValueError(\"expert_data and loaded_weight must be torch.Tensor\")\n533\t\n534\t        if (\n535\t            self.quant_config is not None\n536\t            and \"modelopt\" in self.quant_config.get_name()\n537\t            and (expert_data.dim() != 2 or loaded_weight.dim() != 2)\n538\t        ):\n539\t            raise ValueError(\n540\t                f\"Expected 2D tensors, got expert_data shape {expert_data.shape} and loaded_weight shape {loaded_weight.shape}\"\n541\t            )\n542\t\n543\t        if shard_id != \"w2\":\n544\t            raise ValueError(f\"shard_id must be 'w2', got {shard_id}\")\n545\t\n546\t        # Index the loaded weight for tp sharding.\n547\t        # down_proj: \"RowParallel\" so tp sharding on input_dim\n548\t        # Narrow parameter and load.\n549\t        if is_bias:\n550\t            # this expert_data is a bias, not weight,\n551\t            # for w2_weight_bias in TP, it does not need to be sharded\n552\t            shard_size = expert_data.shape[-1]\n553\t        else:\n554\t            # this parameter is a weight matrix\n555\t            # for w2 in TP, it shards the input_features, i.e., shard_dim=2\n556\t            shard_size = expert_data.shape[shard_dim]\n557\t\n558\t        if self.use_padded_loading:\n559\t            if _is_cpu and is_bias:\n560\t                shard_dim = 1\n561\t            expert_data, loaded_weight = narrow_padded_param_and_loaded_weight(\n562\t                expert_data,\n563\t                loaded_weight,\n564\t                0,  # param_data_start\n565\t                shard_size * tp_rank,\n566\t                shard_dim,\n567\t                shard_size,\n568\t                not self.use_presharded_weights,\n569\t            )\n570\t        else:\n571\t            if not is_bias and not self.use_presharded_weights:\n572\t                if self.use_triton_kernels:\n573\t                    loaded_weight = loaded_weight.transpose(-2, -1)\n574\t                loaded_weight = loaded_weight.narrow(\n575\t                    shard_dim, shard_size * tp_rank, shard_size\n576\t                )\n577\t\n578\t        # w2, down_proj: Load into only logical weight of w2.\n579\t        expert_data.copy_(loaded_weight)\n580\t\n581\t    def _maybe_load_fp8_shared_expert_as_fp4(\n582\t        self,\n583\t        param: torch.nn.Parameter,\n584\t        loaded_weight: None)\n623\t            if fp8_scale is None:\n624\t                self._pending_fp8_shared_weights[key] = loaded_weight\n625\t                return True\n626\t        else:\n627\t            fp8_weight = self._pending_fp8_shared_weights.pop(key, None)\n628\t            fp8_scale = loaded_weight\n629\t            if fp8_weight is None:\n630\t                self._pending_fp8_shared_scales[key] = loaded_weight\n631\t                return True\n632\t\n633\t        logging.getLogger(__name__).warning_once(\n634\t            \"Loading FP8 shared expert            )\n646\t        fp4_weight, fp4_scale = quantize_block_fp8_weight_to_mxfp4(\n647\t            fp8_weight, fp8_scale, weight_block_size\n648\t        )\n649\t\n650\t        weight_data = param_data[expert_id] = loaded_weight\n675\t\n676\t    def _load_g_idx(\n677\t        self,\n678\t        shard_id: str,\n679\t        expert_data: torch.Tensor,\n680\t        shard_dim: int,\n681\t int:\n697\t        start_idx = self.moe_ep_rank * self._num_local_routed\n698\t        end_idx = start_idx + self._num_local_routed\n699\t        if start_idx <= expert_id < end_idx:\n700\t            return expert_id - start_idx\n701\t        elif self._has_fused_shared and expert_id >= self._num_global_routed:\n702\t            return expert_id - self._num_global_routed + self._num_local_routed\n703\t        else:\n704\t            return -1\n705\t\n706\t    def weight_loader(\n707\t        self,\n708\t        param: torch.nn.Parameter,\n709\t        loaded_weight: torch.Tensor,\n710\t        weight_name: str,\n711\t        shard_id: str,\n712\t        expert_id: Optional[int],\n713\t    ) -> None:\n714\t        # if expert_id is None, then\n715\t        # all \"mxfp4\"\n720\t            and self.quant_config.is_static_cfg()\n721\t        ):\n722\t            if \"bias\" in weight_name:\n723\t                dim1 = loaded_weight.shape[1]\n724\t               ]\n763\t            else:\n764\t                physical_expert_ids = [self._num_global_routed + shared_expert_id]\n765\t        else:\n766\t            physical_expert_ids = (\n767\t )\n771\t\n772\t        for physical_expert_id in physical_expert_ids:\n773\t            self._weight_loader_physical(\n774\t                param=param,\n775\t    )\n810\t\n811\t    def _load_gguf_weight(\n812\t        self,\n813\t        param: torch.nn.Parameter,\n814\t        loaded_weight: torch.Tensor,\n815\t        shard_id: str,\n816\t        expert_id: int,\n817\t        tp_rank: int,\n818\t    ) -> bool:\n819\t        \"\"\"Handle GGUF weight loading.\n820\t\n821\t        Args:\n822\t            param: The parameter to load the weight into.\n823\t            loaded_weight: The weight tensor to load.\n824\t            shard_id: The shard ID (w1, w2, or w3).\n825\t            expert_id: The expert ID.\n826\t            tp_rank: The                param.expert_data_map = {}\n852\t\n853\t            key = (expert_id, shard_id)\n854\t            param.expert_data_map[key] = loaded_weight\n855\t            param.data_container.append(loaded_weight)\n856\t            return True\n857\t\n858\t        return False\n859\t\n860\t    def _weight_loader_impl(\n861\t        self,\n862\t        param: torch.nn.Parameter,\n863\t        loaded_weight: torch.Tensor,\n864\t        weight_name: str,\n865\t        shard_id: str,\n866\t        expert_id: int,\n867\t    ) -> None:\n868\t        tp_rank = self.moe_tp_rank\n869\t\n870\t        # Special case for GGUF weights\n871\t        if self._load_gguf_weight(param, loaded_weight, shard_id, expert_id, tp_rank):\n872\t            return\n873\t\n874\t        # compressed-tensors checkpoints with packed weights are stored flipped\n875\t        # TODO (mgoin): check self.quant_method.quant_config.quant_format\n876\t        # against known CompressionFormat enum values that have this quality\n877\t        method = self.quant_method\n878\t        if hasattr(self, \"scheme\"):\n879\t            method = self.scheme\n880\t        if method.__class__.__name__ == \"KTEPWrapperMethod\":\n881\t            method = method.gpu_method\n882\t\n883\t        # For flashinfer TRT-LLM BF16 path, process_weights_after_loading reshapes\n884\t        # expert weights into block layout. During weight update, we must restore\n885\t        # canonical load-time shapes before copying checkpoint tensors.\n886\t        if isinstance(method, UnquantizedFusedMoEMethod):\n887\t            method.maybe_restore_flashinfer_trtllm_bf16_weight_shape_for_load(\n888\t                layer=self,\n889\t                param=param,\n890\t                weight_name=weight_name,\n891\t            )\n892\t        elif isinstance(method, Fp8MoEMethod) and (\n893\t            get_moe_runner_backend().is_flashinfer_trtllm_routed()\n894\t            or get_moe_runner_backend().is_flashinfer_trtllm()\n895\t        ):\n896\t            # Drop the GPU mxfp8 shuffle-index cache on every reload for mxfp8 trtllm, trtllm_routed\n897\t            from sglang.srt.layers.moe.moe_runner.flashinfer_trtllm import (\n898\t                clear_mxfp8_shuffle_index_cache,\n899\t            )\n900\t\n901\t            clear_mxfp8_shuffle_index_cache()\n902\t\n903\t        loaded_weight = (\n904\t            loaded_weight.t().contiguous()\n905\t            if (\n906\t                method.__class__.__name__\n907\t                in [\n908\t                    \"CompressedTensorsWNA16MarlinMoE\",\n909\t                    \"CompressedTensorsWNA16MoE\",\n910\t                    \"CompressedTensorsWNA16TritonMoE\",\n911\t                ]\n912\t            )\n913\t            and \"zero\" not in weight_name\n914\t            else loaded_weight\n915\t        )\n916\t\n917\t        if shard_id not in (\"w1\", \"w2\", \"w3\"):\n918\t            raise ValueError(f\"shard_id must be ['w1','w2','w3'] but got {shard_id}.\")\n919\t\n920\t        # Flashinfer assumes w31 format for w13_weight. head_param_name=\"lm_head.weight\",\n92\t):\n93\t    \"\"\"Shared PP filter for Gemma4 load_weights paths.\n94\t\n95\t    Returns True if the caller should ``continue`` (handled or skipped),\n96\t    False otherwise.  No-op when ``pp_group.world_size == 1``.\n97\t\n98\t    Handles three concerns in order:\n99\t      1. Drop transformer-layer weights outside [start_layer, end_layer).\n100\t      2. Route the tied ``embed_tokens.weight`` to ``lm_head`` on the last\n101\t         rank (under PP, embed and lm_head live on different ranks so they\n102\t         can't be tied via module aliasing).\n103\t      3. Skip rank-local module weights on the wrong rank.\n104\t    \"\"\"\n105\t    if pp_group.world_size <= 1:\n106\t        return False\n107\t\n108\t    layer_id = get_layer_id(name)\n109\t    if layer_id is not None and (layer_id < start_layer or layer_id >= end_layer):\n110\t        return True\n111\t\n112\t    if tie_word_embeddings and pp_group.is_last_rank and name == embed_weight_name:\n113\t        head_param = params_dict.get(head_param_name)\n114\t        if head_param is not None:\n115\t            wl = getattr(head_param, \"weight_loader\", default_weight_loader)\n116\t            wl(head_param, loaded_weight)\n117\t            loaded_params.add(head_param_name)\n118\t        return True\n119\t\n120\t    if not pp_group.is_first_rank and any(p in name for p in first_rank_only_patterns):\n121\t        return True\n122\t\n123\t    if not pp_group.is_last_rank and any(\n124\t        name.startswith(p) for p in last_rank_only_prefixes\n125\t    ):\n126\t        return True\n127\t\n128\t    return False\n129\t\n130\t\n131\tclass Gemma4Router(nn.Module):\n132\t    \"\"\"Router for Gemma4 MoE that preprocesses input before projection.\n133\t\n134\t    Applies RMSNorm (no learned weight), root_size scaling\n135\t    (hidden_size^{-0.5}), then a learned per-dimension scale before\n136\t    projecting to expert logits.\n137\t\n138\t    This preprocessing is applied ONLY to the router's input, not to\n139\t    the expert MLPs' input.\n140\t    \"\"\"\n141\t\n142\t    def __init__(\n143\t        self,\n144\t        config,\n145\t        quant_config: QuantizationConfig | None = None,\n146\t        prefix: str = \"\",\n147\t    ) -> None:\n148\t        super().__init__()\n149\t        self.hidden_size = config.hidden_size\n150\t\n151\t        # RMSNorm without learned weight — scale is folded into norm weight\n152\t        # after loading so forward is a single fused norm kernel.\n153\t        self.norm = Gemma4RMSNorm(\n154\t            self.hidden_size, eps=config.rms_norm_eps, with_scale=False\n155\t        )\n156\t        # Per-dimension learned scale, applied after norm + root_size\n157\t        self.scale = nn.Parameter(torch.ones(self.hidden_size))\n158\t        # Constant 1/sqrt(hidden_size) scaling factor\n159\t        self.register_buffer(\n160\t            \"root_size\",\n161\t            torch.tensor(self.hidden_size**-0.5),\n162\t            persistent=False,\n163\t        )\n164\t        # Project to expert logits; replicated across TP for consistent routing\n165\t        self.proj = ReplicatedLinear(\n166\t            self.hidden_size,\n167\t            config.num_experts,\n168\t            bias=False,\n169\t            quant_config=None,\n170\t            prefix=add_prefix(\"proj\", prefix),\n171\t        )\n172\t        self._scale_fused = False\n173\t\n174\t    def fuse_scale(self):\n175\t        \"\"\"Fold scale * root_size into norm.weight so forward needs no extra mul.\"\"\"\n176\t        fused = (self.scale * self.root_size).to(self.norm.weight.dtype)\n177\t        self.norm.weight.data.copy_(fused)\n178\t        self._scale_fused = True\n179\t\n180\t    def forward(self, x: torch.Tensor) -> torch.Tensor:\n181\t        \"\"\"Returns raw router logits [T, E].\"\"\"\n182\t        if not self._scale_fused:\n183\t            self.fuse_scale()\n184\t        x = self.norm(x)\n185\t        router_logits, _ = self.proj(x)\n186\t        return router_logits\n187\t\n188\t\n189\tclass Gemma4MoE(nn.Module):\n190\t    \"\"\"Mixture of Experts for Gemma4.\n191\t\n192\t    Wraps MoE implementation with custom routing. The router projection is\n193\t    external (Gemma4Router) — this class only handles expert dispatch.\n194\t\n195\t    Gemma4 routing: softmax over ALL experts → top-k → renormalize.\n196\t    per_expert_scale is folded into routing weights for mathematical\n197\t    correctness with MoE's fused kernel.\n198\t    \"\"\"\n199\t\n200\t    def __init__(\n201\t        self,\n202\t self.tp_size = get_parallel().tp_size\n213\t\n214\t        # Per-expert output scale folded into routing weights so that\n215\t        # MoE's fused kernel computes: Σ_e (expert_e * w_e * scale_e)\n216\t        self.per_expert_scale = nn.Parameter(torch.ones(config.num_experts))\n217\t\n218\t        # Capture param directly to avoid closing over self in the routing closure.\n219\t        per_expert_scale = self.per_expert_scale\n220\t\n221\t        def routing_function(\n222\t            hidden_states: torch.Tensor,\n223\t            gating_output: torch.Tensor,\n224\t            topk: int,\n225\t            renormalize: bool,  # always True for Gemma4; softmax identity only holds when renormalizing\n226\t        ) -> tuple[torch.Tensor, torch.Tensor]:\n227\t            # softmax(all)[topk] / sum(softmax(all)[topk]) = softmax(topk_logits),\n228\t            # so we softmax only the top-k logits (fewer kernel launches).\n229\t            if (\n230\t                gating_output.is_cuda\n231\t                and gating_output.dim() == 2\n232\t                and gating_output.dtype\n233\t                in (torch.float16, torch.bfloat16, torch.float32)\n234\t            ):\n235\t                return gemma4_fused_routing(gating_output, per_expert_scale, topk)\n236\t\n237\t            topk_logits, topk_ids = torch.topk(gating_output, k=topk, dim=-1)\n238\t\n239\t            # Fused: softmax + per_expert_scale gather + mul + casts in one kernel\n240\t            if topk_logits.is_cuda or topk_logits.is_xpu:\n241\t                return self.topk = TopK(\n250\t            top_k=config.top_k_experts,\n251\t            layer_id=layer_id,\n252\t            custom_routing_function=routing_function,\n253\t        )\n254\t\n255\t        experts_type = get_moe_impl_class(quant_config)\n256\t\n257\t        self.experts = experts_type(\n258\t            num_experts=config.num_experts\n259\t            + prefix: str = \"\",\n288\t    ) -> None:\n289\t        super().__init__()\n290\t\n291\t        self.layer_id = layer_id\n292\t        self.config = config\n293\t        tp_size = hidden_size,\n328\t            self.head_dim,\n329\t            self.total_num_heads,\n330\t            self.total_num_kv_heads,\n331\t            bias=config.attention_bias,\n332\t            quant_config=quant_config,\n333\t            prefix=add_prefix(\"qkv_proj\", prefix),\n334\t        )\n335\t        self.o_proj = RowParallelLinear(\n336\t            self.total_num_heads * self.head_dim,\n337\t            hidden_size,\n338\t            bias=config.attention_bias,\n339\t            quant_config=quant_config,\n340\t            prefix=add_prefix(\"o_proj\", prefix),\n341\t        )\n342\t\n343\t        self.q_norm = Gemma4RMSNorm(\n344\t            self.head_dim,\n345\t            eps=config.rms_norm_eps,\n346\t        )\n347\t        self.k_norm = Gemma4RMSNorm(\n348\t            self.head_dim,\n349\t            eps=config.rms_norm_eps,\n350\t        )\n351\t        self.v_norm = Gemma4RMSNorm(\n352\t            self.head_dim, eps=config.rms_norm_eps, scale_shift=0.0, with_scale=False\n353\t        )\n354\t\n355\t        if layer_type in config.rope_parameters:\n356\t            rope_parameters = dict(config.rope_parameters[layer_type])\n357\t        else:\n358\t            rope_parameters = dict(\n359\t                rope_type=\"default\",\n360\t                rope_theta=10000.0,\n361\t            )\n362\t\n363\t        # KV sharing logic\n364\t        num_kv_shared_layers = getattr(config, \"num_kv_shared_layers\", 0)\n365\t        first_kv_shared_layer_idx = config.num_hidden_layers - num_kv_shared_layers\n366\t        self.is_kv_shared_layer = (\n367\t            layer_id >= first_kv_shared_layer_idx and num_kv_shared_layers > 0\n368\t        )\n369\t\n370\t        self.kv_shared_layer_index = None\n371\t        if num_kv_shared_layers > 0 and self.layer_id >= first_kv_shared_layer_idx:\n372\t            prev_layers = config.layer_types[:first_kv_shared_layer_idx]\n373\t            current_layer_type = config.layer_types[self.layer_id]\n374\t            if current_layer_type not in prev_layers:\n375\t                raise ValueError(\n376\t                    f\"KV sharing layer {self.layer_id} has {set(prev_layers)}\"\n379\t                )\n380\t            self.kv_shared_layer_index = (\n381\t                len(prev_layers) - 1 - prev_layers[::-1].index(current_layer_type)\n382\t            )\n383\t\n384\t        self.rotary_emb = get_rope(\n385\t            self.head_dim,\n386\t            rotary_dim=self.head_dim,\n387\t            max_position=max_position_embeddings,\n388\t            base=rope_parameters.get(\"rope_theta\", 10000.0),\n389\t            rope_scaling={\"rope_type\": rope_parameters.get(\"rope_type\", \"default\")},\n390\t            partial_rotary_factor=rope_parameters.get(\"partial_rotary_factor\", 1.0),\n391\t            is_neox_style=True,\n392\t        )\n393\t\n394\t        self.attn = RadixAttention(\n395\t            self.num_heads,\n396\t            self.head_dim,\n397\t            1,  # scaling factor\n398\t            num_kv_heads=self.num_kv_heads,\n399\t            layer_id=(\n400\t                self.kv_shared_layer_index if self.is_kv_shared_layer else self.layer_id\n401\t            ),\n402\t            logit_cap=0.0,\n403\t            sliding_window_size=self.sliding_window,\n404\t            quant_config=quant_config,\n405\t            prefix=add_prefix(\"attn\", prefix),\n406\t        )\n407\t\n408\t    def forward(\n409\t        self,\n410\t        positions: torch.Tensor,\n411\t        hidden_states: torch.Tensor,\n412\t        forward_batch: ForwardBatch,\n413\t        **kwargs,\n414\t    ):\n415\t        qkv, _ = self.qkv_proj(hidden_states)\n416\t        q, k, v = qkv.split([self.q_size, self.kv_size, self.kv_size], dim=-1)\n417\t\n418\t        # Fused Q/K/V RMSNorm: replaces three separate norm kernels with one.\n419\t        # Preconditions for the fused path: tensors on CUDA or XPU (the kernel\n420\t        # is pure Triton and lowers to both backends), q_norm/k_norm use the\n421\t        # standard norm*weight (scale_shift==0) and v_norm has is not None\n425\t        )\n426\t        can_fuse_qkv_norm = (\n427\t            (q.is_cuda or q.is_xpu)\n428\t            and self.q_norm.scale_shift == 0.0\n429\t            and self.k_norm.scale_shift == 0.0\n430\t            and not self.v_norm.with_scale\n431\t        )\n432\t        if can_fuse_qkv_norm:\n433\t            if is_kv_shared:\n434\t None,\n440\t                    num_q_heads=self.num_heads,\n441\t                    num_kv_heads=self.num_kv_heads,\n442\t                    head_dim=self.head_dim,\n443\t                    eps=self.q_norm.eps,\n444\t                )\n445\t                k = None\n446\t                v = None\n447\t            else:\n448\t                gemma_qkv_rmsnorm(\n449\t                    q,\n450\t                    k,\n451\t                    v,\n452\t                    self.q_norm.weight.data,\n453\t                    self.k_norm.weight.data,\n454\t                    num_q_heads=self.num_heads,\n455\t                    num_kv_heads=self.num_kv_heads,\n456\t                    head_dim=self.head_dim,\n457\t                    eps=self.q_norm.eps,\n458\t                )\n459\t                # Match the original norm path's output shapes: q stays 2D,\n460\t                # k/v become 3D so the subsequent `.flatten(-2, -1)` works.\n461\t                # Use reshape (not view) since k/v are strided slice views of\n462\t                # the qkv buffer and may not satisfy view's contiguity rules.\n463\t                k = k.reshape(-1, self.num_kv_heads, self.head_dim)\n464\t                v = v.reshape(-1, self.num_kv_heads, self.head_dim)\n465\t        else:\n466\t            q = q.unflatten(-1, (self.num_heads, self.head_dim))\n467\t            q = self.q_norm(q)\n468\t            q = q.flatten(-2, -1)\n469\t            if is_kv_shared:\n470\t                k = None\n471\t                v = None\n472\t            else:\n473\t                k = k.unflatten(-1, (self.num_kv_heads, self.head_dim))\n474\t                k = self.k_norm(k)\n475\t                v = v.unflatten(-1, (self.num_kv_heads, self.head_dim))\n476\t                v = self.v_norm(v)\n477\t\n478\t        # Apply rotary embedding\n479\t        use_fused_kv = False\n480\t        if k is not None:\n481\t            k = k.flatten(-2, -1)\n482\t            # Fuse RoPE + KV-cache write for non-SWA layers with bf16 cache\n483\t            # DISABLED: causes accuracy regression in launch_server path\n484\t            can_fuse = False\n485\t            if can_fuse:\n486\t                fused_arg = create_fused_set_kv_buffer_arg(\n487\t                    value=v.flatten(-2, -1) if v.dim() == 3 else v,\n488\t                    layer=self.attn,\n489\t                    forward_batch=forward_batch,\n490\t                )\n491\t                use_fused_kv = True\n492\t            else:\n493\t                fused_arg = None\n494\t            q, k = self.rotary_emb(positions, q, k, fused_set_kv_buffer_arg=fused_arg)\n495\t            k = k.unflatten(-1, (self.num_kv_heads, self.head_dim))\n496\t        else:\n497\t            # Rotary embedding requires a key input; use zeros since KV is shared from another layer\n498\t            dummy_k = torch.zeros_like(q[:, : self.kv_size])\n499\t            q, _ = self.rotary_emb(positions, q, dummy_k)\n500\t\n501\t        q = q.unflatten(-1, (self.num_heads, self.head_dim))\n502\t        attn_output = self.attn(\n503\t            q,\n504\t            k,\n505\t            v,\n506\t            forward_batch=forward_batch,\n507\t            save_kv_cache=not self.is_kv_shared_layer and not use_fused_kv,\n508\t        )\n509\t        if attn_output.dim() == 3:\n510\t            attn_output = attn_output.flatten(-2, -1)\n511\t        output, _ = self.o_proj(attn_output)\n512\t\n513\t        return output\n514\t\n515\t\n516\tclass Gemma4DecoderLayer(nn.Module):\n517\t    def config.hidden_size, eps=config.rms_norm_eps\n571\t        )\n572\t        self.pre_feedforward_layernorm = RMSNorm(\n573\t            config.hidden_size, eps=config.rms_norm_eps\n574\t        )\n575\t        self.post_feedforward_layernorm = RMSNorm(\n576\t            config.hidden_size, eps=config.rms_norm_eps\n577\t        )\n578\t\n579\t        # Per-Layer Embedding (PLE) components — present in each decoder layer\n580\t        if self.hidden_size_per_layer_input > 0:\n581\t            # Gate: projects hidden_states → per-layer dim for gating\n582\t            self.per_layer_input_gate = quant_config=quant_config,\n587\t                prefix=add_prefix(\"per_layer_input_gate\", prefix),\n588\t            )\n589\t            # Projection: projects gated per-layer input back → hidden bias=False,\n594\t                quant_config=quant_config,\n595\t                prefix=add_prefix(\"per_layer_projection\", prefix),\n596\t            )\n597\t hidden_size=self.hidden_size,\n615\t                layer_id=layer_id,\n616\t                config=config,\n617\t                quant_config=quant_config,\n618\t                prefix=add_prefix(\"moe\", prefix),\n619\t            )\n620\t\n621\t            self.post_feedforward_layernorm_1 = RMSNorm(\n622\t                config.hidden_size, eps=config.rms_norm_eps\n623\t            )\n624\t            self.post_feedforward_layernorm_2 = RMSNorm(\n625\t                config.hidden_size, eps=config.rms_norm_eps\n626\t            )\n627\t     self.moe = None\n633\t            self.post_feedforward_layernorm_1 = None\n634\t            self.post_feedforward_layernorm_2 = None\n635\t            self.pre_feedforward_layernorm_2 = prefix\n640\t\n641\t    def forward(\n642\t        self,\n643\t        positions: torch.Tensor,\n644\t        hidden_states: torch.Tensor,\n645\t        per_layer_input: torch.Tensor,\n646\t        forward_batch: ForwardBatch,\n647\t        **kwargs,\n648\t    ) -> tuple[\n649\t        torch.FloatTensor, Optional[tuple[torch.FloatTensor, torch.FloatTensor]]\n650\t    ]:\n651\t        # Gemma4 residual pattern following JAX implementation:\n652\t        # 1. input_norm(x) -> attn -> post_attn_norm -> ADD residual\n653\t        # 2. pre_ff_norm -> mlp -> post_ff_norm -> ADD residual\n654\t        #\n655\t        # Optimization: fuse \"post_attn_norm(h) + residual; pre_ff_norm(...)\"\n656\t        # into \"post_attn_norm(h); pre_ff_norm(h, residual)\" using\n657\t        # gemma_fused_add_rmsnorm which computes:\n658\t        #   residual = h + residual (in-place)\n659\t        #   h = gemma_norm(residual)\n660\t        residual = hidden_states\n661\t\n662\t        # Apply input layernorm\n663\t        hidden_states = self.input_layernorm(hidden_states)\n664\t        hidden_states = self.self_attn(\n665\t            positions=positions,\n666\t            hidden_states=hidden_states,\n667\t            forward_batch=forward_batch,\n668\t        )\n669\t        hidden_states = self.post_attention_layernorm(hidden_states)\n670\t\n671\t        if self.enable_moe_block:\n672\t            # Fuse: hidden_states + residual -> residual; pre_ff_norm(residual) -> hidden_states\n673\t            # Also need raw (unfused) residual for router and pre_ff_norm_2\n674\t            hidden_states, residual = self.pre_feedforward_layernorm(\n675\t                hidden_states, residual\n676\t            )\n677\t            # For MoE: router and pre_ff_norm_2 need the unfused residual\n678\t            # (which is now updated to post_attn_out + old_residual)\n679\t            moe_input = residual\n680\t\n681\t            # Dense MLP branch\n682\t            hidden_states_1 = self.mlp(hidden_states)\n683\t\n684\t            # MoE branch: router sees residual (= post_attn_out + old_residual)\n685\t            router_logits = self.router(moe_input)\n686\t            hidden_states_2 = self.pre_feedforward_layernorm_2(moe_input)\n687\t            hidden_states_2 = self.moe(hidden_states_2, router_logits)\n688\t\n689\t            # Fused: (rmsnorm(rmsnorm(h1,w1) + rmsnorm(h2,w2), w3) + residual) * scalar\n690\t            if (\n691\t                not self.has_ple\n692\t                and (hidden_states_1.is_cuda or hidden_states_1.is_xpu)\n693\t                and hidden_states_1.dim() == 2\n694\t            ):\n695\t                norm1 = self.post_feedforward_layernorm_1\n696\t                norm2 = self.post_feedforward_layernorm_2\n697\t                norm3 = self.post_feedforward_layernorm\n698\t                hidden_states = gemma_dual_rmsnorm_residual_scalar(\n699\t                    hidden_states_1,\n700\t                    norm1.weight.data,\n701\t                    hidden_states_2,\n702\t                    norm2.weight.data,\n703\t                    norm3.weight.data,\n704\t                    residual,\n705\t                    self.layer_scalar,\n706\t                    norm1.variance_epsilon,\n707\t                    norm2.variance_epsilon,\n708\t                    norm3.variance_epsilon,\n709\t                )\n710\t                return hidden_states, None\n711\t\n712\t            hidden_states_1 = self.post_feedforward_layernorm_1(hidden_states_1)\n713\t            hidden_states_2 = self.post_feedforward_layernorm_2(hidden_states_2)\n714\t\n715\t            # Combine branches\n716\t            hidden_states = hidden_states_1 + hidden_states_2\n717\t        else:\n718\t            # Fuse: hidden_states + residual -> residual; pre_ff_norm(residual) -> hidden_states\n719\t            hidden_states, residual = self.pre_feedforward_layernorm(\n720\t                hidden_states, residual\n721\t            )\n722\t            hidden_states = self.mlp(hidden_states)\n723\t\n724\t        if (\n725\t            not self.has_ple\n726\t            and self.moe is None\n727\t            and (hidden_states.is_cuda or hidden_states.is_xpu)\n728\t            and hidden_states.dim() == 2\n729\t        ):\n730\t            # Fused: (post_ff_norm(h) + residual) * layer_scalar in one kernel\n731\t            norm = self.post_feedforward_layernorm\n732\t            hidden_states = gemma_rmsnorm_residual_scalar(\n733\t                hidden_states,\n734\t                norm.weight.data,\n735\t                residual,\n736\t                self.layer_scalar,\n737\t                norm.variance_epsilon,\n738\t            )\n739\t        else:\n740\t            hidden_states = self.post_feedforward_layernorm(hidden_states)\n741\t            hidden_states = hidden_states + residual\n742\t\n743\t            if self.has_ple and per_layer_input is not None:\n744\t                gate, _ = self.per_layer_input_gate(hidden_states)\n745\t                gate = torch.nn.functional.gelu(gate, approximate=\"tanh\")\n746\t                gated_per_layer = gate * per_layer_input\n747\t                per_layer_contribution, _ = self.per_layer_projection(gated_per_layer)\n748\t                per_layer_contribution = self.post_per_layer_input_norm(\n749\t                    per_layer_contribution\n750\t                )\n751\t                hidden_states = hidden_states + per_layer_contribution\n752\t\n753\t            hidden_states = hidden_states * self.layer_scalar\n754\t        return hidden_states, None\n755\t\n756\t\n757\tclass Gemma4TextModel(PreTrainedModel):\n758\t    def __init__(\n759\t        self,\n760\t        config: Gemma4TextConfig,\n761\t        quant_config: Optional[QuantizationConfig] = None,\n762\t        prefix: str = \"\",\n763\t    ) -> None:\n764\t        super().__init__(config=config)\n765\t        self.config = config\n766\t        self.quant_config = quant_config\n767\t        self.vocab_size = config.vocab_size\n768\t        self.padding_idx = getattr(config, \"pad_token_id\", None)\n769\t        self.pp_group = get_pp_group()\n770\t\n771\t        # Token / per-layer embedding tables and the per-layer projection only\n772\t        # produce activations consumed at the model entry, so they live on the\n773\t        # first PP rank only.  Other ranks substitute PPMissingLayer so that\n774\t        # parameter iteration still works (load_weights skips them explicitly).\n775\t        self.hidden_size = config.hidden_size\n776\t        self.hidden_size_per_layer_input = (\n777\t            getattr(config, \"hidden_size_per_layer_input\", None) or 0\n778\t        )\n779\t        self.vocab_size_per_layer_input = (\n780\t            getattr(config, \"vocab_size_per_layer_input\", None) or config.vocab_size\n781\t        )\n782\t\n783\t        # PLE-enabled variants (E2B/E4B) forward `per_layer_inputs` through\n784\t        # the PP proxy, but cuda_graph_runner hardcodes the proxy schema to\n785\t        # {hidden_states, residual} and silently drops any extra keys at\n786\t        # replay time.  Empirically this corrupts E4B output to garbage on\n787\t        # non-first PP ranks (eager path produces correct output and\n788\t        # GSM8K ~0.92, cuda-graph path emits token soup).  Refuse the\n789\t        # combination until the runner becomes schema-aware; users can run\n790\t        # PP + PLE eagerly with --disable-cuda-graph.\n791\t        if self.pp_group.world_size > 1 and self.hidden_size_per_layer_input > 0:\n792\t            sa = get_global_server_args()\n793\t            if sa is not None and not sa.disable_cuda_graph:\n794\t                raise ValueError(\n795\t                    \"Pipeline parallelism is currently incompatible with \"\n796\t                    \"per-layer-input (PLE) embeddings under CUDA graph: \"\n797\t                    \"the runner's PP proxy schema is hardcoded to \"\n798\t                    \"{hidden_states, residual} and silently drops \"\n799\t                    \"per_layer_inputs, corrupting per-layer contributions on \"\n800\t                    \"non-first PP ranks. Workarounds: (a) pass \"\n801\t                    \"--disable-cuda-graph to fall back to eager replay, or \"\n802\t                    \"(b) use tensor parallelism (--tp-size) instead of PP.\"\n803\t                )\n804\t\n805\t        if self.pp_group.is_first_rank:\n806\t            self.embed_tokens = Gemma4TextScaledWordEmbedding(\n807\t                config.vocab_size,\n808\t                config.hidden_size,\n809\t                self.padding_idx,\n810\t                embed_scale=self.config.hidden_size**0.5,  # embedded normalizer\n811\t            )\n812\t        else:\n813\t            self.embed_tokens = PPMissingLayer()\n814\t\n815\t        if (\n816\t            self.pp_group.is_first_rank\n817\t            and self.hidden_size_per_layer_input\n818\t            and self.hidden_size_per_layer_input > 0\n819\t        ):\n820\t            self.embed_tokens_per_layer = Gemma4TextScaledWordEmbedding(\n821\t                self.vocab_size_per_layer_input,\n822\t                config.num_hidden_layers * self.hidden_size_per_layer_input,\n823\t                self.padding_idx,\n824\t                embed_scale=self.hidden_size_per_layer_input**0.5,\n825\t            )\n826\t\n827\t            self.per_layer_model_projection = ReplicatedLinear(\n828\t                self.hidden_size,\n829\t                config.num_hidden_layers * self.hidden_size_per_layer_input,\n830\t                bias=False,\n831\t                quant_config=quant_config,\n832\t                prefix=add_prefix(\"per_layer_model_projection\", prefix),\n833\t            )\n834\t\n835\t            self.per_layer_projection_norm = RMSNorm(\n836\t                self.hidden_size_per_layer_input,\n837\t                config.rms_norm_eps,\n838\t            )\n839\t            self.per_layer_input_scale = torch.rsqrt(torch.tensor(2.0))\n840\t            self.per_layer_projection_scale = torch.tensor(\n841\t                config.hidden_size**-0.5,\n842\t            )\n843\t        else:\n844\t            self.embed_tokens_per_layer = None\n845\t            self.per_layer_model_projection = None\n846\t            self.per_layer_projection_norm = None\n847\t            self.per_layer_input_scale = None\n848\t            self.per_layer_projection_scale = None\n849\t\n850\t        self.layers, self.start_layer, self.end_layer = make_layers(\n851\t            config.num_hidden_layers,\n852\t            lambda idx, prefix: Gemma4DecoderLayer(\n853\t                layer_id=idx,\n854\t                config=config,\n855\t                quant_config=quant_config,\n856\t                prefix=prefix,\n857\t            ),\n858\t            pp_rank=self.pp_group.rank_in_group,\n859\t            pp_size=self.pp_group.world_size,\n860\t            prefix=add_prefix(\"layers\", prefix),\n861\t        )\n862\t\n863\t        if self.pp_group.is_last_rank:\n864\t            self.norm = self.post_init()\n869\t\n870\t    def get_input_embeddings(self) -> nn.Embedding:\n871\t        return self.embed_tokens\n872\t\n873\t    def dtype(self) -> torch.dtype:\n874\t        return next(self.parameters()).dtype\n875\t\n876\t    def get_per_layer_inputs(self, input_ids: torch.LongTensor) -> torch.Tensor:\n877\t        if self.embed_tokens_per_layer is None:\n878\t            return None\n879\t\n880\t        # Handle out-of-vocab tokens for PLE (vocab_size_per_layer_input may\n881\t        # be smaller than the main vocab_size). Following Gemma3n pattern.\n882\t        per_layer_inputs_mask = torch.logical_and(\n883\t            input_ids >= 0,\n884\t            input_ids < self.vocab_size_per_layer_input,\n885\t        )\n886\t        per_layer_inputs_tokens = torch.where(\n887\t            per_layer_inputs_mask, input_ids, torch.zeros_like(input_ids)\n888\t        )\n889\t\n890\t        # Get packed per-layer embeddings: (num_tokens, total_ple_dim)\n891\t        per_layer_embeds = self.embed_tokens_per_layer(per_layer_inputs_tokens)\n892\t\n893\t        # Apply embed_scale (sqrt of per-layer hidden dim)\n894\t        # Already done in embedding layer\n895\t        # per_layer_embeds = per_layer_embeds * self.embed_scale_per_layer\n896\t\n897\t        # Reshape to (num_tokens, num_layers, hidden_size_per_layer_input)\n898\t        per_layer_embeds = per_layer_embeds.reshape(\n899\t            *input_ids.shape,\n900\t            self.config.num_hidden_layers,\n901\t            self.hidden_size_per_layer_input,\n902\t        )\n903\t        return per_layer_embeds\n904\t\n905\t    def project_per_layer_inputs(\n906\t        self,\n907\t        inputs_embeds: torch.Tensor,\n908\t        per_layer_inputs: Optional[torch.Tensor] = None,\n909\t    ) -> torch.Tensor:\n910\t        \"\"\"Project inputs_embeds and combine with per_layer_inputs.\n911\t\n912\t        Following HF/Gemma3n reference:\n913\t        1. Project inputs_embeds: hidden_size → total_ple_dim\n914\t        2. Scale by hidden_size^{-0.5} (Gemma4ScaledLinear w_scale)\n915\t        3. Reshape to (num_tokens, num_layers, per_layer_dim)\n916\t        4. Normalize with per_layer_projection_norm\n917\t        5. Combine: (projection + per_layer_inputs) * 1/sqrt(2)\n918\t        \"\"\"\n919\t        if self.per_layer_model_projection is None:\n920\t            return None\n921\t\n922\t        # Project from hidden_size to total_ple_dim\n923\t        per_layer_projection, _ = self.per_layer_model_projection(inputs_embeds)\n924\t\n925\t        # Apply w_scale (HF: Gemma4ScaledLinear with w_scale=hidden_size^{-0.5})\n926\t        per_layer_projection = per_layer_projection * self.per_layer_projection_scale\n927\t\n928\t        # Reshape to (num_tokens, num_layers, hidden_size_per_layer_input)\n929\t        per_layer_projection = per_layer_projection.reshape(\n930\t            *inputs_embeds.shape[:-1],\n931\t            self.config.num_hidden_layers,\n932\t            self.hidden_size_per_layer_input,\n933\t        )\n934\t\n935\t        # Normalize\n936\t        per_layer_projection = self.per_layer_projection_norm(per_layer_projection)\n937\t\n938\t        if per_layer_inputs is None:\n939\t            return per_layer_projection\n940\t\n941\t        # Combine: (projection + per_layer_inputs) * scale\n942\t        return (per_layer_projection + per_layer_inputs) * self.per_layer_input_scale\n943\t\n944\t    def forward(\n945\t        self,\n946\t        input_ids: torch.Tensor,\n947\t        positions: torch.Tensor,\n948\t        forward_batch: ForwardBatch,\n949\t        input_embeds: torch.Tensor = None,\n950\t        per_layer_inputs: Optional[torch.Tensor] = None,\n951\t        pp_proxy_tensors: Optional[PPProxyTensors] = None,\n952\t        **kwargs,\n953\t    ) -> Union[torch.Tensor, Tuple[torch.Tensor, List[torch.Tensor]], PPProxyTensors]:\n954\t        if self.pp_group.is_first_rank:\n955\t            if (input_ids is None) ^ (input_embeds is not None):\n956\t                raise ValueError(\n957\t                    \"You must specify exactly one of input_ids or inputs_embeds\"\n958\t                )\n959\t\n960\t            if input_ids is not None:\n961\t                input_embeds = self.embed_tokens(input_ids)\n962\t                per_layer_inputs = self.get_per_layer_inputs(input_ids)\n963\t            per_layer_inputs = self.project_per_layer_inputs(\n964\t                input_embeds, per_layer_inputs\n965\t            )\n966\t            hidden_states = input_embeds\n967\t        else:\n968\t            assert (\n969\t                pp_proxy_tensors is not None\n970\t            ), \"pp_proxy_tensors is required on non-first PP ranks\"\n971\t            hidden_states = pp_proxy_tensors[\"hidden_states\"]\n972\t            # PLE inputs were computed on rank 0 and forwarded along the\n973\t            # pipeline; non-PLE models simply omit the key.\n974\t            per_layer_inputs = pp_proxy_tensors.tensors.get(\"per_layer_inputs\", None)\n975\t\n976\t        aux_hidden_states = []\n977\t        num_layers = self.config.num_hidden_layers\n978\t\n979\t        for layer_idx in range(self.start_layer, self.end_layer):\n980\t            if layer_idx in self.layers_to_capture:\n981\t                aux_hidden_states.append(hidden_states)\n982\t\n983\t            if per_layer_inputs is not None:\n984\t                per_layer_input = per_layer_inputs[:, layer_idx, :]\n985\t            else:\n986\t                per_layer_input = None\n987\t            layer = self.layers[layer_idx]\n988\t            layer_outputs = layer(\n989\t                positions=positions,\n990\t                hidden_states=hidden_states,\n991\t                per_layer_input=per_layer_input,\n992\t                forward_batch=forward_batch,\n993\t                **kwargs,\n994\t            )\n995\t            hidden_states = layer_outputs[0]\n996\t            # Gemma4DecoderLayer.forward always returns (hidden_states, None);\n997\t            # the residual is fused inside the layer, so nothing to thread.\n998\t\n999\t        if not self.pp_group.is_last_rank:\n1000\t            # cuda_graph_runner allocates a fixed PP-proxy schema of\n1001\t            # {hidden_states, residual} and KeyErrors if a model omits a key.\n1002\t            # Gemma4 fuses the residual inside each layer so we don't have a\n1003\t            # standalone tensor to forward; emit a zero placeholder instead so\n1004\t            # graph replay can still copy it.  The receiving stage never reads\n1005\t            # this key.\n1006\t            proxy = {\n1007\t                \"hidden_states\": hidden_states,\n1008\t                \"residual\": torch.zeros_like(hidden_states),\n1009\t            }\n1010\t            if per_layer_inputs is not None:\n1011\t                proxy[\"per_layer_inputs\"] = per_layer_inputs\n1012\t            return PPProxyTensors(proxy)\n1013\t\n1014\t        # Capture the output of the last layer if requested.\n1015\t        # layers_to_capture uses +1 offset, so num_layers means\n1016\t        # \"output of the last layer\" which is only available after the loop.\n1017\t        if num_layers in self.layers_to_capture:\n1018\t            aux_hidden_states.append(hidden_states)\n1019\t\n1020\t        hidden_states = self.norm(hidden_states)\n1021\t\n1022\t        if len(aux_hidden_states) == 0:\n1023\t            return hidden_states\n1024\t\n1025\t        return hidden_states, aux_hidden_states\n1026\t\n1027\t\n1028\tclass Gemma4ForCausalLM(PreTrainedModel):\n1029\t    config_class = Gemma4TextConfig\n1030\t    base_model_prefix = \"language_model\"\n1031\t    _tied_weights_keys = {\"lm_head.weight\": \"model.embed_tokens.weight\"}\n1032\t    _tp_plan = {\"lm_head\": \"colwise_rep\"}\n1033\t\n1034\t    # Under PP those\n1108\t        # tensors live on different ranks (embed on first, head on last) and\n1109\t        # the missing side is a PPMissingLayer with no ``weight`` attribute,\n1110\t        # \"Some weights are not initialized from checkpoints\",\n1357\t                    lambda p: p in param_names,\n1358\t                ),\n1359\t                logging.INFO: (\n1360\t torch.Tensor:\n1375\t        \"\"\"Shard a full embedding/lm_head weight along vocab dim for the current TP rank.\n1376\t\n1377\t        Gemma4 uses nn.Embedding (unsharded) but the Eagle3 draft model uses\n1378\t        VocabParallelEmbedding (sharded). This method extracts the correct\n1379\t        shard so the weights can be shared.\n1380\t        \"\"\"\n1381\t        tp_size = get_parallel().tp_size\n1382\t        if tp_size <= 1:\n1383\t            return weight\n1384\t        tp_rank = get_parallel().tp_rank\n1385\t        shard_size = (weight.shape[0] + tp_size - 1) // tp_size\n1386\t        return weight[tp_rank * shard_size : (tp_rank + 1) * shard_size]\n1387\t\n1388\t    def get_embed(self):\n1389\t        return self._shard_weight(self.model.embed_tokens.weight)\n1390\t\n1391\t    def get_embed_and_head(self):\n1392\t        if self.pp_group.world_size > 1:\n1393\t            # Under PP, embed_tokens lives on the first rank and lm_head on\n1394\t            # the last; neither rank holds both tensors, so we can't return\n1395\t            # the pair locally without a cross-stage gather. {"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_vrtx_01SZCSgbmwU1eaHxyuuV9nFj","type":"tool_result","content":"1\t# SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0\n2\t\"\"\"Native MXFP8 (1x32 block, E8M0 scale) ops for AMD CDNA4 (gfx950).\n3\t\n4\t  * per-token MXFP8 activation quant (single fused Triton pass)\n5\t  * dense GEMM via Triton ``tl.dot_scaled`` (consumes FP8 E4M3 weights + E8M0\n6\t    block scales directly, no dequant-to-BF16), lowering to the CDNA4 native MX\n7\t    matrix-core ops; ``K % 128 != 0`` falls back to dequant + ``F.linear``.\n8\t\n9\tReplaces the FlyDSL ``v_mfma_scale_f32_32x32x64`` dense path with a single\n10\tTriton ``dot_scaled`` GEMM: no load-time weight reformat (fp8 + E8M0 are\n11\tconsumed as-is) and the activation is MXFP8-quantized in one fused pass.\n12\t\"\"\"\n13\t\n14\tfrom __future__ import annotations\n15\t\n16\tfrom typing import Optional, Tuple\n17\t\n18\timport torch\n19\timport torch.nn.functional as F\n20\timport triton\n21\timport triton.language as tl\n22\t\n23\t# MXFP8 constants (OCP microscaling: 1x32 block, E8M0 shared scale).\n24\tMXFP8_VALUE_DTYPE = torch.float8_e4m3fn\n25\tMXFP8_SCALE_DTYPE = torch.uint8\n26\tMXFP8_BLOCK_SIZE = 32\n27\tMXFP8_E4M3_MAX = 448.0  # max representable magnitude of float8_e4m3fn\n28\t\n29\t\n30\t# --------------------------------------------------------------------------- #\n31\t# MXFP8 quantization (per-32-block E8M0 scale + FP8-E4M3 values)\n32\t# --------------------------------------------------------------------------- #\n33\tdef _mxfp8_e4m3_quantize_torch(x: torch.Tensor) -> Tuple[torch.Tensor, torch.Tensor]:\n34\t    \"\"\"Naive (reference) MXFP8 quantization.\n35\t\n36\t    For each block of 32 elements along the last dim, compute a shared E8M0\n37\t    scale and quantize each element to float8_e4m3fn. The E8M0 exponent is\n38\t    rounded *up* -- ``ceil(log2(amax / e4m3_max)) + 127`` -- so the block amax\n39\t    stays inside the e4m3 range (no clipping) and the full dynamic range is\n40\t    used, matching ``triton_kernels`` ``downcast_to_mxfp`` (ROUND_UP) and the\n41\t    SGLang fp8 quant kernels. Returns ``(values [same shape, fp8], scales\n42\t    [..., K//32] u8)``.\n43\t    \"\"\"\n44\t    assert x.shape[-1] % MXFP8_BLOCK_SIZE == 0\n45\t    orig_shape = x.shape\n46\t    num_blocks = x.shape[-1] // MXFP8_BLOCK_SIZE\n47\t\n48\t    x_fp32 = x.to(torch.float32)\n49\t    x_blocked = x_fp32.view(*orig_shape[:-1], num_blocks, MXFP8_BLOCK_SIZE)\n50\t\n51\t    amax = x_blocked.abs().amax(dim=-1)\n52\t    amax = amax.clamp(min=torch.finfo(torch.float32).tiny)\n53\t    scale_biased = (torch.ceil(torch.log2(amax / MXFP8_E4M3_MAX)) + 127.0).clamp(0, 254)\n54\t    scales_uint8 = scale_biased.to(torch.uint8)\n55\t\n56\t    descale = torch.exp2(scale_biased - 127.0)\n57\t    x_scaled = (x_blocked / descale.unsqueeze(-1)).clamp(\n58\t        -MXFP8_E4M3_MAX, MXFP8_E4M3_MAX\n59\t    )\n60\t    x_fp8 = x_scaled.view(orig_shape).to(MXFP8_VALUE_DTYPE)\n61\t\n62\t    scales_uint8 = scales_uint8.view(*orig_shape[:-1], num_blocks)\n63\t    return x_fp8, scales_uint8\n64\t\n65\t\n66\t@triton.jit\n67\tdef _mxfp8_quant_kernel(\n68\t    x_ptr,\n69\t    xq_ptr,\n70\t    s_ptr,\n71\t    M,\n72\t    K,\n73\t    sxm,\n74\t    sxk,\n75\t    sqm,\n76\t    sqk,\n77\t    ssm,\n78\t    ssk,\n79\t    BLOCK_M: tl.constexpr,\n80\t):\n81\t    \"\"\"Per-32-block E8M0 scale + FP8-E4M3 quant, one program per ``[BLOCK_M, 32]``.\"\"\"\n82\t    pid_m = tl.program_id(0)\n83\t    pid_b = tl.program_id(1)  # which 32-element block along K\n84\t    offs_m = pid_m * BLOCK_M + tl.arange(0, BLOCK_M)\n85\t    offs_k = pid_b * 32 + tl.arange(0, 32)\n86\t    m_mask = offs_m < M\n87\t    x = tl.load(\n88\t        x_ptr + offs_m[:, None] * sxm + offs_k[None, :] * sxk,\n89\t        mask=m_mask[:, None],\n90\t        other=0.0,\n91\t    ).to(tl.float32)\n92\t    amax = tl.maximum(tl.max(tl.abs(x), axis=1), 1e-30)  # [BLOCK_M]\n93\t    # Round the E8M0 exponent up (ceil(log2(amax / e4m3_max))) so the block amax\n94\t    # stays inside the e4m3 range and the full dynamic range is used.\n95\t    sb = tl.ceil(tl.log2(amax / 448.0)) + 127.0\n96\t    sb = tl.minimum(tl.maximum(sb, 0.0), 254.0)\n97\t    descale = tl.exp2(sb - 127.0)\n98\t    xq = tl.clamp(x / descale[:, None], -448.0, 448.0).to(xq_ptr.dtype.element_ty)\n99\t    tl.store(\n100\t        xq_ptr + offs_m[:, None] * sqm + offs_k[None, :] * sqk,\n101\t        xq,\n102\t        mask=m_mask[:, None],\n103\t    )\n104\t    tl.store(s_ptr + offs_m * ssm + pid_b * ssk, sb.to(tl.uint8), mask=m_mask)\n105\t\n106\t\n107\tdef _mxfp8_e4m3_quantize_triton(\n108\t    x: torch.Tensor,\n109\t) -> Tuple[torch.Tensor, torch.Tensor]:\n110\t    \"\"\"Fused 2D MXFP8 quant (row-major [M, K//32] UE8M0 scales).\"\"\"\n111\t    M, K = x.shape\n112\t    x = x.contiguous()\n113\t    xq = torch.empty((M, K), dtype=MXFP8_VALUE_DTYPE, device=x.device)\n114\t    scales = torch.empty(\n115\t        (M, K // MXFP8_BLOCK_SIZE), dtype=MXFP8_SCALE_DTYPE, device=x.device\n116\t    )\n117\t    BLOCK_M = 64\n118\t    grid = (triton.cdiv(M, BLOCK_M), K // MXFP8_BLOCK_SIZE)\n119\t    _mxfp8_quant_kernel[grid](\n120\t        x,\n121\t        xq,\n122\t        scales,\n123\t        M,\n124\t        K,\n125\t        x.stride(0),\n126\t        x.stride(1),\n127\t        xq.stride(0),\n128\t        xq.stride(1),\n129\t        scales.stride(0),\n130\t        scales.stride(1),\n131\t        BLOCK_M=BLOCK_M,\n132\t    )\n133\t    return xq, scales\n134\t\n135\t\n136\tdef mxfp8_e4m3_quantize(x: torch.Tensor) -> Tuple[torch.Tensor, torch.Tensor]:\n137\t    \"\"\"Per-token MXFP8 quant -> (fp8 values, [.., K//32] uint8 UE8M0 scales).\n138\t\n139\t    Uses the single fused Triton kernel for the common 2D, ``K % 32 == 0`` case\n140\t    (activations); falls back to the torch reference otherwise.\n141\t    \"\"\"\n142\t    if x.ndim == 2 and x.shape[-1] % MXFP8_BLOCK_SIZE == 0 and x.is_cuda:\n143\t        return _mxfp8_e4m3_quantize_triton(x.contiguous())\n144\t    return _mxfp8_e4m3_quantize_torch(x)\n145\t\n146\t\n147\tdef dequant_mxfp8_to_bf16(x: torch.Tensor, scales: torch.Tensor) -> torch.Tensor:\n148\t    \"\"\"Dequantize an MXFP8 tensor (fp8 values + UE8M0 scales) to BF16.\"\"\"\n149\t    x_float = x.to(torch.float32)\n150\t    num_blocks = x.shape[-1] // MXFP8_BLOCK_SIZE\n151\t    x_blocked = x_float.view(*x.shape[:-1], num_blocks, MXFP8_BLOCK_SIZE)\n152\t    descale = torch.exp2(scales.to(torch.float32) - 127.0)\n153\t    dequantized = (x_blocked * descale.unsqueeze(-1)).view(*x.shape)\n154\t    return dequantized.to(torch.bfloat16)\n155\t\n156\t\n157\t# --------------------------------------------------------------------------- #\n158\t# Dense MXFP8 linear via Triton tl.dot_scaled (CDNA4 native microscaling)\n159\t# --------------------------------------------------------------------------- #\n160\t@triton.jit\n161\tdef _mxfp8_linear_kernel(\n162\t    x_ptr,\n163\t    xs_ptr,\n164\t    w_ptr,\n165\t    ws_ptr,\n166\t    out_ptr,\n167\t    M,\n168\t    N,\n169\t    K,\n170\t    stride_xm,\n171\t    stride_xk,\n172\t    stride_xsm,\n173\t    stride_xsk,\n174\t    stride_wn,\n175\t    stride_wk,\n176\t    stride_wsn,\n177\t    stride_wsk,\n178\t    stride_om,\n179\t    stride_on,\n180\t    BLOCK_M: tl.constexpr,\n181\t    BLOCK_N: tl.constexpr,\n182\t    BLOCK_K: tl.constexpr,\n183\t):\n184\t    pid_m = tl.program_id(0)\n185\t    pid_n = tl.program_id(1)\n186\t    offs_m = pid_m * BLOCK_M + tl.arange(0, BLOCK_M)\n187\t    offs_n = pid_n * BLOCK_N + tl.arange(0, BLOCK_N)\n188\t    offs_k = tl.arange(0, BLOCK_K)\n189\t    offs_sk = tl.arange(0, BLOCK_K // 32)\n190\t    m_mask = offs_m < M\n191\t    n_mask = offs_n < N\n192\t\n193\t    x_ptrs = x_ptr + offs_m[:, None] * stride_xm + offs_k[None, :] * stride_xk\n194\t    xs_ptrs = xs_ptr + offs_m[:, None] * stride_xsm + offs_sk[None, :] * stride_xsk\n195\t    w_ptrs = w_ptr + offs_n[:, None] * stride_wn + offs_k[None, :] * stride_wk\n196\t    ws_ptrs = ws_ptr + offs_n[:, None] * stride_wsn + offs_sk[None, :] * stride_wsk\n197\t\n198\t    acc = tl.zeros((BLOCK_M, BLOCK_N), dtype=tl.float32)\n199\t    for _ in range(0, tl.cdiv(K, BLOCK_K)):\n200\t        x = tl.load(x_ptrs, mask=m_mask[:, None], other=0.0)\n201\t        w = tl.load(w_ptrs, mask=n_mask[:, None], other=0.0)\n202\t        xs = tl.load(xs_ptrs, mask=m_mask[:, None], other=0)\n203\t        ws = tl.load(ws_ptrs, mask=n_mask[:, None], other=0)\n204\t        acc += tl.dot_scaled(x, xs, \"e4m3\", w.T, ws, \"e4m3\")\n205\t        x_ptrs += BLOCK_K * stride_xk\n206\t        w_ptrs += BLOCK_K * stride_wk\n207\t        xs_ptrs += (BLOCK_K // 32) * stride_xsk\n208\t        ws_ptrs += (BLOCK_K // 32) * stride_wsk\n209\t\n210\t    o_ptrs = out_ptr + offs_m[:, None] * stride_om + offs_n[None, :] * stride_on\n211\t    tl.store(\n212\t        o_ptrs,\n213\t        acc.to(out_ptr.dtype.element_ty),\n214\t        mask=m_mask[:, None] & n_mask[None, :],\n215\t    )\n216\t\n217\t\n218\tdef _run_mxfp8_linear_kernel(\n219\t    x_q: torch.Tensor,  # [M, K] fp8 e4m3\n220\t    x_scale: torch.Tensor,  # [M, K//32] uint8 (E8M0)\n221\t    w: torch.Tensor,  # [N, K] fp8 e4m3\n222\t    w_scale: torch.Tensor,  # [N, K//32] uint8 (E8M0)\n223\t    out_dtype: torch.dtype,\n224\t) -> torch.Tensor:\n225\t    M, K = x_q.shape\n226\t    N = w.shape[0]\n227\t    out = torch.empty((M, N), dtype=out_dtype, device=x_q.device)\n228\t    BLOCK_M, BLOCK_K = 64, 128\n229\t    if M <= 512 and (K >= 4096 or (N == 6144 and K in (2048, 3072))):\n230\t        BLOCK_N, num_warps = 64, 4\n231\t    else:\n232\t        BLOCK_N, num_warps = 128, 8\n233\t    grid = (triton.cdiv(M, BLOCK_M), triton.cdiv(N, BLOCK_N))\n234\t    _mxfp8_linear_kernel[grid](\n235\t        x_q,\n236\t        x_scale,\n237\t        w,\n238\t        w_scale,\n239\t        out,\n240\t        M,\n241\t        N,\n242\t        K,\n243\t        x_q.stride(0),\n244\t        x_q.stride(1),\n245\t        x_scale.stride(0),\n246\t        x_scale.stride(1),\n247\t        w.stride(0),\n248\t        w.stride(1),\n249\t        w_scale.stride(0),\n250\t        w_scale.stride(1),\n251\t        out.stride(0),\n252\t        out.stride(1),\n253\t        BLOCK_M=BLOCK_M,\n254\t        BLOCK_N=BLOCK_N,\n255\t        BLOCK_K=BLOCK_K,\n256\t        num_warps=num_warps,\n257\t    )\n258\t    return out\n259\t\n260\t\n261\tdef _mxfp8_dot_scaled_linear(\n262\t    x: torch.Tensor,  # [M, K] bf16/fp16\n263\t    w: torch.Tensor,  # [N, K] fp8 e4m3\n264\t    w_scale: torch.Tensor,  # [N, K//32] uint8 (E8M0)\n265\t) -> torch.Tensor:\n266\t    \"\"\"bf16/fp16 input -> per-token MXFP8 quant -> dot_scaled GEMM.\"\"\"\n267\t    x_q, x_scale = mxfp8_e4m3_quantize(x)\n268\t    return _run_mxfp8_linear_kernel(x_q, x_scale, w, w_scale, x.dtype)\n269\t\n270\t\n271\tdef dot_scaled_mxfp8_blockscaled_linear(\n272\t    input: torch.Tensor,\n273\t    weight: torch.Tensor,\n274\t    weight_scale: torch.Tensor,\n275\t    input_scale: Optional[torch.Tensor] = None,\n276\t    bias: Optional[torch.Tensor] = None,\n277\t    output_dtype: Optional[torch.dtype] = None,\n278\t) -> torch.Tensor:\n279\t    \"\"\"Native dense MXFP8 linear (CDNA4 ``tl.dot_scaled``).\n280\t\n281\t    Consumes FP8 E4M3 ``weight`` + canonical 2D UE8M0 ``weight_scale`` [N, K//32]\n282\t    directly. Activations are MXFP8-quantized per token inside the kernel path.\n283\t    Drop-in for the SGLang ``w8a8_mxfp8_linear`` callable signature.\n284\t    \"\"\"\n285\t    assert weight.dtype == torch.float8_e4m3fn, \"MXFP8 weight must be FP8 E4M3.\"\n286\t    assert weight_scale.dtype == torch.uint8, \"MXFP8 weight_scale must be UE8M0 uint8.\"\n287\t    assert weight_scale.dim() == 2, (\n288\t        \"dot_scaled MXFP8 linear expects canonical 2D [N, K//32] weight scales, \"\n289\t        f\"got {weight_scale.dim()}D.\"\n290\t    )\n291\t\n292\t    input_2d = input.view(-1, input.shape[-1]).contiguous()\n293\t    output_shape = [*input.shape[:-1], weight.shape[0]]\n294\t    if output_dtype is None:\n295\t        output_dtype = (\n296\t            input_2d.dtype\n297\t            if input_2d.dtype in (torch.float16, torch.bfloat16, torch.float32)\n298\t            else torch.bfloat16\n299\t        )\n300\t\n301\t    m, k = input_2d.shape\n302\t    n, k_w = weight.shape\n303\t    assert k == k_w, f\"{k=} does not match {k_w=}\"\n304\t\n305\t    if k % 128 == 0:\n306\t        if input_scale is None:\n307\t            # Quantize the bf16/fp16 activations per token inside the path.\n308\t            x_q, x_scale = mxfp8_e4m3_quantize(input_2d)\n309\t            kernel_out_dtype = input_2d.dtype\n310\t        else:\n311\t            # Activations already MXFP8-quantized by a fused upstream op.\n312\t            assert (\n313\t                input_2d.dtype == MXFP8_VALUE_DTYPE\n314\t            ), \"pre-quantized input must be FP8 E4M3 when input_scale is given.\"\n315\t            assert input_scale.dtype == torch.uint8 and input_scale.shape == (\n316\t                m,\n317\t                k // 32,\n318\t            ), \"input_scale must be UE8M0 uint8 [M, K//32].\"\n319\t            x_q, x_scale = input_2d, input_scale\n320\t            kernel_out_dtype = output_dtype\n321\t        out = _run_mxfp8_linear_kernel(\n322\t            x_q, x_scale, weight, weight_scale, kernel_out_dtype\n323\t        )\n324\t    else:\n325\t        # dot_scaled tiling needs K % 128 == 0; dequantize fallback otherwise.\n326\t        w_bf16 = dequant_mxfp8_to_bf16(weight, weight_scale)\n327\t        if input_scale is not None:\n328\t            input_2d = dequant_mxfp8_to_bf16(input_2d, input_scale)\n329\t        out = F.linear(input_2d.to(w_bf16.dtype), w_bf16).to(output_dtype)\n330\t\n331\t    if bias is not None:\n332\t        out = out + bias\n333\t    return out.to(output_dtype).view(*output_shape)\n334\t"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_vrtx_019L744veQXjonfaedCqpgoA","session_id":"6c00f995-8633-4cb5-95e8-33a68b262772","uuid":"b39486c8-6052-46e8-91d0-01f2e2cdaeb7","timestamp":"2026-07-17T16:28:34.812Z","subagent_type":"Explore","task_description":"Explore GEMM and kernel config"}

bit8_min,\n208\t    bit8_max,\n209\t    # Meta-parameters\n210\t    BLOCK: tl.constexpr,\n211\t    SCALE_UE8M0: tl.constexpr,\n212\t):\n213\t    \"\"\"A Triton-accelerated function to perform per-token-group\n214\t    quantization on a tensor.\n215\t    This function converts the tensor values into float8 values.\n216\t    \"\"\"\n217\t    # Map the program id to the row of X and Y it size used for quantization.\n261\t        eps: The minimum to avoid dividing zero.\n262\t        dtype: The dype of output tensor.\n263\t\n264\t    Returns:\n265\t        Tuple[torch.Tensor, cannot be divisible by `group_size`\"\n270\t    assert x.is_contiguous(), \"`x` is not contiguous\"\n271\t\n272\t    if _is_hip:\n273\t        if dtype == torch.int8:\n274\t            bit8_max = 127.0\n275\t        else:\n276\t            bit8_max = 224.0\n277\t        bit8_min = -bit8_max  # TODO incorrect for int8\n278\t    else:\n279\t        if dtype == torch.int8:\n280\t            info = torch.iinfo(dtype)\n281\t        else:\n282\t            info = torch.finfo(dtype)\n283\t        bit8_max = info.max\n284\t        bit8_min = info.min\n285\t\n286\t    x_q = torch.empty_like(x, device=x.device, dtype=dtype)\n287\t    x_s = create_per_token_group_quant_fp8_output_scale(\n288\t        x_shape=x.shape,\n289\t        device=x.device,\n290\t        group_size=group_size,\n291\t        column_major_scales=column_major_scales,\n292\t        scale_tma_aligned=scale_tma_aligned,\n293\t        scale_ue8m0=False,\n294\t    )\n295\t\n296\t    M = x.numel() // group_size\n297\t    N = group_size\n298\t\n299\t    BLOCK = triton.next_power_of_2(N)\n300\t    # heuristics for number of warps\n301\t    num_warps = min(max(BLOCK // 256, 1), 8)\n302\t    num_stages = 1\n303\t    if x.shape[1],\n310\t            x_s.stride(1),\n311\t            eps,\n312\t            bit8_min=bit8_min,\n313\t            bit8_max=bit8_max,\n314\t            BLOCK=BLOCK,\n315\t            num_warps=num_warps,\n316\t            num_stages=num_stages,\n317\t            SCALE_UE8M0=scale_ue8m0,\n318\t        )\n319\t    else:\n320\t        assert not scale_ue8m0\n321\t        _per_token_group_quant_8bit[(M,)](\n322\t            x,\n323\t            x_q,\n324\t            x_s,\n325\t            group_size,\n326\t            N,\n327\t            eps,\n328\t            bit8_min=bit8_min,\n329\t            bit8_max=bit8_max,\n330\t            BLOCK=BLOCK,\n331\t            num_warps=num_warps,\n332\t            num_stages=num_stages,\n333\t        )\n334\t\n335\t    if scale_ue8m0:\n336\t        from deep_gemm import transform_sf_into_required_layout\n337\t\n338\t        assert group_size == 128\n339\t        x_s = transform_sf_into_required_layout(\n340\t            x_s,\n341\t            num_groups=None,\n342\t            mn=x_q.shape[0],\n343\t            k=x_q.shape[1],\n344\t            recipe=(1, group_size, group_size),\n345\t            is_sfa=True,\n346\t        )\n347\t\n348\t    return x_q, x_s\n349\t\n350\t\n351\tdef _per_token_group_quant_8bit_fuse_silu_and_mul(\n352\t    x: torch.Tensor,\n353\t    group_size: int,\n354\t group_size,\n462\t    column_major_scales: bool,\n463\t    scale_tma_aligned: bool,\n464\t    scale_ue8m0: bool,\n465\t):\n466\t    if scale_ue8m0:\n467\t        if column_major_scales and x_s\n598\t\n599\t\n600\tdef sglang_per_token_group_quant_fp8_row_padded(\n601\t    x: torch.Tensor,\n602\t    group_size: int,\n603\t    eps: float = 1e-10,\n604\t    row_alignment: int = 4,\n605\t) -> Tuple[torch.Tensor, torch.Tensor]:\n606\t    \"\"\"Per-token-group quant writing into row-padded buffers (col-major scales).\n607\t\n608\t    The cutlass fp8_blockwise_scaled_mm wrapper pads mat_a / scales_a to a\n609\t    multiple of 4 rows on every call (a zeros fill + a cat for each of mat_a\n610\t    and scales_a). Allocating the quant outputs with rows already aligned to\n611\t    ``row_alignment`` makes the wrapper's pad_tensor() short-circuit (pad_rows\n612\t    == 0), removing 2x fill + 2x cat kernels per GEMM. Rows in [m, m_pad) are\n613\t    uninitialized garbage; the caller must slice the GEMM output back to m.\n614\t    \"\"\"\n615\t    assert x.dim() == 2, \"row-padded quant expects a 2D input\"\n616\t    assert (\n617\t        x.shape[-1] % group_size == 0\n618\t    ), \"the last dimension of `x` must be divisible by `group_size`\"\n619\t    assert x.is_contiguous(), \"`x` is not contiguous\"\n620\t\n621\t    if not (enable_sgl_per_token_group_quant_8bit and group_size in (16, 32, 64, 128)):\n622\t        # No v2 kernel available: keep the legacy unpadded path and let the\n623\t        # GEMM wrapper do the padding.\n624\t        return sglang_per_token_group_quant_fp8(\n625\t            x, group_size, eps, column_major_scales=True\n626\t        )\n627\t\n628\t    m, k = x.shape\n629\t    m_pad = ceil_align(m, row_alignment)\n630\t    # mat_a buffer: (m_pad, k) row-major fp8\n631\t    x_q = torch.empty((m_pad, k), device=x.device, dtype=fp8_dtype)\n632\t    # scales_a buffer: column-major (stride(0) == 1), shape (m_pad, k // group)\n633\t    x_s = torch.empty(\n634\t        (k // group_size, m_pad), device=x.device, dtype=torch.float32\n635\t    ).transpose(0, 1)\n636\t    if m > 0:\n637\t        sgl_per_token_group_quant_8bit(\n638\t            x,\n639\t            x_q[:m],\n640\t            x_s[:m],\n641\t            group_size,\n642\t            eps,\n643\t            fp8_min,\n644\t            fp8_max,\n645\t            False,  # scale_ue8m0\n646\t            False,  # fuse_silu_and_mul\n647\t            None,  # masked_m\n648\t            enable_v2=True,\n649\t        )\n650\t    return x_q, x_s\n651\t\n652\t\n653\tdef sglang_per_token_group_quant_fp8_ue8m0(\n654\t    x: torch.Tensor,\n655\t    group_size: int,\n656\t    eps: float     )\n694\t\n695\t    return x_q, x_s\n696\t\n697\t\n698\t# TODO maybe unify int8 and fp8 code later\n699\tdef sglang_per_token_group_quant_8bit(\n700\t    x: torch.Tensor,\n701\t    group_size: \"`x` is not contiguous\"\n746\t\n747\t    x_q = torch.empty_like(x, device=x.device, dtype=dtype)\n748\t    x_s = torch.empty(\n749\t        x.shape[0],\n750\t        1,\n751\t per_token_group_quant_fp8 = sglang_per_token_group_quant_fp8\n762\telse:\n763\t    per_token_group_quant_fp8 = _per_token_group_quant_8bit_raw\n764\t\n765\t\n766\t@triton.jit\n767\tdef _static_quant_fp8(\n768\t    # Pointers to inputs and output\n769\t    y_ptr,\n770\t    y_q_ptr,\n771\t    y_s_ptr,\n772\t    y_s_repeat_ptr,\n773\t    # Stride of input\n774\t    y_stride,\n775\t    # Columns of input\n776\t    N,\n777\t    # Information for float8\n778\t    fp8_min,\n779\t    fp8_max,\n780\t    # Meta-parameters\n781\t    BLOCK: tl.constexpr,\n782\t    REPEAT_SCALE: tl.constexpr,\n783\t    USE_PDL: tl.constexpr = False,\n784\t):\n785\t    \"\"\"A Triton-accelerated function to perform quantization using the given scale on a\n786\t    tensor\n787\t\n788\t    This function converts the tensor values into float8 values.\n789\t    \"\"\"\n790\t    # Map the program id to the row of X and Y it should compute.\n791\t    g_id = tl.program_id(0)\n792\t    y_ptr += g_id * y_stride\n793\t    y_q_ptr += g_id * y_stride\n794\t    if REPEAT_SCALE:\n795\t        y_s_repeat_ptr += g_id\n796\t\n797\t    cols = tl.arange(0, BLOCK)  # N <= BLOCK\n798\t    mask = cols < N\n799\t\n800\t    if USE_PDL:\n801\t        tl.extra.cuda.gdc_wait()\n802\t\n803\t    y = tl.load(y_ptr + cols, mask=mask, other=0.0).to(tl.float32)\n804\t    y_s = tl.load(y_s_ptr).to(tl.float32)\n805\t\n806\t    if USE_PDL:\n807\t        tl.extra.cuda.gdc_launch_dependents()\n808\t\n809\t    y_s_inv = 1.0 / y_s\n810\t    y_q = tl.clamp(y * y_s_inv, fp8_min, fp8_max).to(y_q_ptr.dtype.element_ty)\n811\t\n812\t    tl.store(y_q_ptr + cols, y_q, mask=mask)\n813\t    if REPEAT_SCALE:\n814\t        tl.store(y_s_repeat_ptr, y_s)\n815\t\n816\t\n817\tdef static_quant_fp8(\n818\t    x: torch.Tensor,\n819\t    x_s: torch.Tensor,\n820\t    repeat_scale: bool = False,\n821\t) -> Tuple[torch.Tensor, torch.Tensor]:\n822\t    \"\"\"Function to perform static quantization using the given scale on an input tensor `x`.\n823\t\n824\t    It converts the tensor values into signed float8 values and returns the\n825\t    quantized tensor along with the scaling factor used for quantization.\n826\t\n827\t    Args:\n828\t        x: The input tensor with ndim >= 2.\n829\t        x_s: The quantization scale.\n830\t        repeat_scale: Whether to broadcast per-tensor scale to per-channel scale.\n831\t        dtype: The dype of output tensor.\n832\t\n833\t    Returns:\n834\t        Tuple[torch.Tensor, torch.Tensor]: The quantized tensor and the scaling factor for quantization.\n835\t    \"\"\"\n836\t    assert x.is_contiguous(), \"`x` is not contiguous\"\n837\t    assert x_s.numel() == 1, \"only supports per-tensor scale\"\n838\t\n839\t    x_q = torch.empty_like(x, device=x.device, dtype=fp8_dtype)\n840\t    M = x.numel() // x.shape[-1]\n841\t    N = x.shape[-1]\n842\t    if repeat_scale:\n843\t        x_s_repeat = torch.empty(\n844\t            (M, 1),\n845\t            device=x.device,\n846\t            dtype=torch.float32,\n847\t        )\n848\t    else:\n849\t        x_s_repeat = None\n850\t\n851\t    BLOCK = triton.next_power_of_2(N)\n852\t    # heuristics for number of warps\n853\t    num_warps = min(max(BLOCK // 256, 1), 8)\n854\t    num_stages = 1\n855\t    pdl_kwargs = {\"USE_PDL\": True, \"launch_pdl\": True} if is_arch_support_pdl() else {}\n856\t    _static_quant_fp8[(M,)](\n857\t        x,\n858\t        x_q,\n859\t        x_s,\n860\t        x_s_repeat,\n861\t        N,\n862\t        N,\n863\t        fp8_min=fp8_min,\n864\t        fp8_max=fp8_max,\n865\t        BLOCK=BLOCK,\n866\t        REPEAT_SCALE=repeat_scale,\n867\t        num_warps=num_warps,\n868\t        num_stages=num_stages,\n869\t        **pdl_kwargs,\n870\t    )\n871\t    x_s = x_s_repeat if repeat_scale else x_s\n872\t    return x_q, x_s\n873\t\n874\t\n875\t@triton.jit\n876\tdef _w8a8_block_fp8_matmul(\n877\t    # Pointers to inputs and output\n878\t    A,\n879\t    B,\n880\t    C,\n881\t    As,\n882\t    Bs,\n883\t    # Shape for matmul\n884\t    M,\n885\t    N,\n886\t    K,\n887\t    # Block size for block-wise quantization\n888\t    group_n,\n889\t    group_k,\n890\t    # Stride for inputs and output\n891\t    stride_am,\n892\t    stride_ak,\n893\t    stride_bk,\n894\t    stride_bn,\n895\t    stride_cm,\n896\t    stride_cn,\n897\t    stride_As_m,\n898\t    stride_As_k,\n899\t    stride_Bs_k,\n900\t    stride_Bs_n,\n901\t    # Meta-parameters\n902\t    BLOCK_SIZE_M: tl.constexpr,\n903\t    BLOCK_SIZE_N: tl.constexpr,\n904\t    BLOCK_SIZE_K: tl.constexpr,\n905\t    GROUP_SIZE_M: tl.constexpr,\n906\t    needs_masking: tl.constexpr,\n907\t):\n908\t    \"\"\"Triton-accelerated function used to perform linear operations (dot\n909\t    product) on input tensors `A` and `B` with block-wise quantization, and store the result in output\n910\t    tensor `C`.\n911\t    \"\"\"\n912\t\n913\t    pid = tl.program_id(axis=0)\n914\t    num_pid_m = tl.cdiv(M, BLOCK_SIZE_M)\n915\t    num_pid_n = tl.cdiv(N, BLOCK_SIZE_N)\n916\t    num_pid_in_group = GROUP_SIZE_M * num_pid_n\n917\t    group_id = pid // num_pid_in_group\n918\t    first_pid_m = group_id * GROUP_SIZE_M\n919\t    group_size_m = min(num_pid_m - first_pid_m, GROUP_SIZE_M)\n920\t    pid_m = first_pid_m + (pid % group_size_m)\n921\t    pid_n = (pid % num_pid_in_group) // group_size_m\n922\t\n923\t    offs_am = (pid_m * BLOCK_SIZE_M + tl.arange(0, BLOCK_SIZE_M)) % M\n924\t    offs_bn = (pid_n * BLOCK_SIZE_N + tl.arange(0, BLOCK_SIZE_N)) % N\n925\t    offs_k = tl.arange(0, BLOCK_SIZE_K)\n926\t    a_ptrs = A + (offs_am[:, None] * stride_am + offs_k[None, :] * stride_ak)\n927\t    b_ptrs = B + (offs_k[:, None] * stride_bk + offs_bn[None, :] * stride_bn)\n928\t\n929\t    As_ptrs = As + offs_am * stride_As_m\n930\t    offs_bsn = offs_bn // group_n\n931\t    Bs_ptrs = Bs + offs_bsn * stride_Bs_n\n932\t    n_tiles_k_per_group_k = group_k // BLOCK_SIZE_K\n933\t\n934\t    accumulator = tl.zeros((BLOCK_SIZE_M, BLOCK_SIZE_N), dtype=tl.float32)\n935\t    for k in range(0, tl.cdiv(K, BLOCK_SIZE_K)):\n936\t        if needs_masking:\n937\t            a = tl.load(a_ptrs, mask=offs_k[None, :] < K - k * BLOCK_SIZE_K, other=0.0)\n938\t            b = tl.load(b_ptrs, mask=offs_k[:, None] < K - k * BLOCK_SIZE_K, other=0.0)\n939\t        else:\n940\t            a = tl.load(a_ptrs)\n941\t            b = tl.load(b_ptrs)\n942\t\n943\t        a_s = tl.load(As_ptrs)\n944\t        b_s = tl.load(Bs_ptrs)\n945\t\n946\t        scale_step_k = tl.where((k + 1) % n_tiles_k_per_group_k == 0, 1, 0)\n947\t        accumulator += tl.dot(a, b) * a_s[:, None] * b_s[None, :]\n948\t        a_ptrs += BLOCK_SIZE_K * stride_ak\n949\t        b_ptrs += BLOCK_SIZE_K * stride_bk\n950\t        As_ptrs += scale_step_k * stride_As_k\n951\t        Bs_ptrs += scale_step_k * stride_Bs_k\n952\t\n953\t    if C.dtype.element_ty == tl.bfloat16:\n954\t        c = accumulator.to(tl.bfloat16)\n955\t    elif C.dtype.element_ty == tl.float16:\n956\t        c = accumulator.to(tl.float16)\n957\t    else:\n958\t        c = accumulator.to(tl.float32)\n959\t\n960\t    offs_cm = pid_m * BLOCK_SIZE_M + tl.arange(0, BLOCK_SIZE_M)\n961\t    offs_cn = pid_n * BLOCK_SIZE_N + tl.arange(0, BLOCK_SIZE_N)\n962\t    c_ptrs = C + stride_cm * offs_cm[:, None] + stride_cn * offs_cn[None, :]\n963\t    c_mask = (offs_cm[:, None] < M) & (offs_cn[None, :] < N)\n964\t    tl.store(c_ptrs, c, mask=c_mask)\n965\t\n966\t\n967\t@triton.jit\n968\tdef _w8a8_block_fp8_matmul_unrolledx4(\n969\t    # Pointers to inputs and output\n970\t    A,\n971\t    B,\n972\t    C,\n973\t Optional[Dict[int, Any]]:\n1148\t    \"\"\"\n1149\t    Return optimized configurations for the w8a8 block fp8 kernel.\n1150\t\n1151\t    The return value will be a dictionary that maps an irregular grid of\n1152\t    batch sizes to configurations of the w8a8 block fp8 kernel. To evaluate the\n1153\t    kernel on a given batch size bs, the closest batch size in the grid should\n1154\t    be picked and the associated configuration chosen to invoke the kernel.\n1155\t    \"\"\"\n1156\t\n1157\t    # First look up if an optimized configuration is available in the configs\n1163\t    # directory\n1164\t    device_name = get_device_name().replace(\" \", \"_\")\n1165\t    json_file_name = f\"N={N},K={K},device_name={device_name},dtype=fp8_w8a8,block_shape=[{block_n}, {block_k}].json\"\n1166\t\n1167\t    config_file_path = os.path.join(\n1168\t        os.path.dirname(os.path.realpath(__file__)), \"configs\", json_file_name\n1169\t    )\n1170\t    if os.path.exists(config_file_path):\n1171\t        with open(config_file_path) as f:\n1172\t            log_info_on_rank0(\n1173\t                logger,\n1174\t                f\"Using configuration from {config_file_path} for W8A8 Block FP8 kernel.\",\n1175\t            )\n1176\t            raw = {int(key): val for key, val in json.load(f).items()}\n1177\t\n1178\t        sanitized = {}\n1179\t        clamped_ms = []\n1180\t        for m_key, cfg in raw.items():\n1181\t            if cfg[\"BLOCK_SIZE_K\"] < block_k and (\n1182\t                not _is_cuda or block_k % cfg[\"BLOCK_SIZE_K\"] != 0\n1183\t            ):\n1184\t                clamped_ms.append((m_key, cfg[\"BLOCK_SIZE_K\"]))\n1185\t                cfg = {**cfg, \"BLOCK_SIZE_K\": block_k}\n1186\t            sanitized[m_key] = cfg\n1187\t        if clamped_ms:\n1188\t            logger.warning(\n1189\t                \"Clamped BLOCK_SIZE_K up to %d in tuned config %s for entries %s \"\n1190\t                \"(scale stepping requires BLOCK_SIZE_K >= block_k).\",\n1191\t                block_k,\n1192\t                json_file_name,\n1193\t                clamped_ms,\n1194\t            )\n1195\t\n1196\t        return sanitized\n1197\t\n1198\t    # None\n1208\t\n1209\t\n1210\tdef select_w8a8_block_fp8_matmul_kernel(M, N, META):\n1211\t    return _w8a8_block_fp8_matmul\n1212\t\n1213\t\n1214\tif _is_hip:\n1215\t\n1216\t    def use_w8a8_block_fp8_matmul_unrolledx4(M, N, META):\n1217\t        # Use manually unrolledx4 kernel on AMD GPU when the grid size is small.\n1218\t        # Empirical testing shows the sweet spot lies when it's less than the # of\n1219\t        # compute units available on the device.\n1220\t        num_workgroups = triton.cdiv(M, META[\"BLOCK_SIZE_M\"]) * triton.cdiv(\n1221\t            N, META[\"BLOCK_SIZE_N\"]\n1222\t        )\n1223\t        num_workgroups <= get_device_core_count()\n1224\t\n1225\t    def select_w8a8_block_fp8_matmul_kernel(M, N, META):\n1226\t        if _w8a8_block_fp8_matmul\n1230\t\n1231\t\n1232\tdef prepare_block_fp8_matmul_inputs(\n1233\t    A: torch.Tensor,\n1234\t    B: torch.Tensor,\n1235\t    As: torch.Tensor,\n1236\t    Bs: triton.cdiv(triton.cdiv(A.shape[-1], block_k), 4) == As.shape[-1]\n1252\t        ), f\"{A.shape=} {As.shape=} {block_size=}\"\n1253\t    else:\n1254\t        raise NotImplementedError\n1255\t\n1256\t
